title: Correlation between the introduction of gastrointestinal PCR panels and the antibiotic prescription in outpatients with gastroentiritis
author: de Vallière Serge
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Excel table summarising the data of 2 cohorts having symptoms of gastroenteritis: 

 - cohort from 2016 investigated by traditional methods 

 - cohort from 2017 investigated by gastrointestinal PCR panels
